authority: brief section 7 Arm I Stage B + Will's Stage-B GO (Stage A ACCEPTED; ruling #6 applied to HR133)

depends_on.note: bench code pinned inside the frozen manifest and enforced by require_frozen (rule 1.9); no external executed instrument this stage (native-Z referee is runner-inline).

organ: II_b_semantics_fingerprint_v1: three division semantics as three rounding modes on one lattice; measured pairwise splits vs the derived sign-configuration predicates; the wrap channel flagged separately (width events are not rounding-mode events).

predictions.PIB.1: semantics closure: on every (pair, semantics) row q*b + r == a exactly AND the per-semantics remainder law holds (trunc: sign(r) == sign(a) or 0; floor: sign(r) == sign(b) or 0; euclid: 0 <= r < |b|); width-wrap entries close where the quotient wraps. Units: (pair, semantics) rows.
predictions.PIB.2: the fingerprint law, two-sided: on every pinned pair (8 FX-I-B + 8 derived sign-grid), measured pairwise splits == the derived predicates (trunc != floor iff r != 0 and sign(a) != sign(b); floor != euclid iff r != 0 and b < 0; trunc != euclid iff r != 0 and a < 0) - and the reverse direction: zero splits anywhere r == 0 (no fingerprint without a distinguishing discard). Either direction failing anywhere = K-I2 refute-row. Grid informativeness: every pairwise comparison shows BOTH outcomes across the battery. Units: pairs x 3 comparisons.
predictions.PIB.3: discard-channel taxonomy exhibits: INT_MIN // -1 - exact division (r == 0): all three semantics identical in Z AND identically wrapped; the quotient-WRAP entry fires and closes the account while the semantics fingerprint stays zero (wrap is a WIDTH event, not a rounding-mode event); AND 13 // 3 (positive pair, r != 0): a discard WITHOUT a distinguisher - zero splits (a fingerprint needs a discard the modes disagree about, not just a discard). Units: 2 exhibits.
predictions.PIB.4: refusal honesty: division by zero and unknown semantics refuse TYPED; zero refusals on the lawful battery. Units: probes + rows.
predictions.PIB.5: determinism: battery byte-stable x2 (sha256 over records).

referee: native Z: independent quotient/remainder recomputation + per-semantics remainder laws, runner-inline.
status_move_rules: CL-I3 -> DEMONSTRATED iff PIB.1 AND PIB.2 AND PIB.3 AND PIB.4 PASS. PIB.2 FAIL = K-I2: CL-I3 REFUTED, chain preserved, continue per brief. Any other FAIL: K-I1 halt-until-fixed, STOP, route to Will.
